ab: malim anga aken a masi kakituan a sunatj.
en: I forgot to bring the textbook.

ab: kisadj aken tjanusun a pacun.
malim anga aken a masi siquliqulip.
en: I forgot to bring the eraser.

ab: ku pasedjamay sun.
en: I can lend you.

ab: malim anga sun a masi sivecik?
en: Do you forget to bring your pen?

ab: ui, pasedjami aken tua su sivecik dri?
en: Yes, can you lend me a pen?

ab: anema muri su cengelj?
en: What would you like for lunch?

ab: muri kincengelj aken tua pang.
en: I want some bread.

ab: anema muri su kaiven?
en: What would you like for dinner?

ab: muri kaiv aken tua vaqu.
en: I want some millet.

ab: anema su kinnama?
en: What did you have for breakfast?

ab: na kenama aken tua qecilu.
en: I ate an egg.

ab: anema su kinincengelj.
en: What did you have for lunch?

ab: na kincengelj aken tua kuka.
en: I ate the chicken.

ab: vaiki a tjemakidr tua budru.
en: Let’s play soccer.

ab: sau vaivaiku, nusauni ku kimav anga sun.
ch: B:你先去，我等一下去找你。
en: You go first and I will catch up later.

ab: vaiki a ljemanguy.
en: Let’s go swimming.

ab: padria! ari kaciuciuri.
en: Sure! Let’s go there together.

ab: nanguaq! ari kaciuciuri.
en: Sure! Let’s go there together.

ab: vaiki a kivangavang ta budru.
en: Let’s play ball.

ab: ini,vaiki anan a semakuc tua sunatj.
en: No, we have to carry books first.

ab: na menurumur anga sun?
en: Did you brush your teeth?

ab: ini anan, semenasenav anan aken tua capar.
en: Not yet. I am doing the dishes.

ab: ini anan, semenasenav anan aken tua kisi.
en: Not yet. I am doing the dishes.

ab: su siniqumu anga sa su beresan?
en: Did you rinse out your mouth?

ab: na qemumu anga aken sa ku beresan.
en: Yes, I rinsed out my mouth.

ab: na semenav anga sun ta capar?
en: Did you wash the dishes?

ab: na semenav anga sun ta kisi?
en: Did you wash the dishes?

ab: ku sinnavan anga capar.
en: I already washed the dishes.

ab: ku sinnavan anga kisi.
en: I already washed the dishes.

ab: aku ika sun a na pilima?
en: Why didn’t you wash your hands?

ab: pilima anga aken nusauni.
en: I will wash my hands later.

ab: kemudakuda sun tasauni?
en: What were you doing just now?

ab: na vaik aken a kipakim tjay sirutemulu.
en: I went to meet the teacher.

ab: na vaik aken a kipakim tjay sinsi.
en: I went to meet the teacher.

ab: nu qemacuvung anga sun tua kitulu anema su kudain?
en: What are you going to do after school?

ab: muri puntalj aken a pasa umaq.
en: I will go home directly.

ab: nu qemacuvung ta kitulu ti sautji anema muri kudain?
en: What is she doing after school?

ab: muri vaik ti sautji a temaligitigan.
en: She is going to go dancing.

ab: muri vaik ti sautji a iugi.
en: She is going to go dancing.
